content.full_text:
July 11, 1990

FPPC
428 "J" Street
Sacramento, Ca. 95874

Attn: Legal Division

We have been asked the following question by a member of the Planning Commission:

If a Planning Commission Member solicits and receives a contribution of more than $250.00 from a party in excess of three months after the action was pending before the Planning Commission, and is subsequently elected to City Council, under which standard is the Commissioner judged at the City Council; is it that found at Government Code Section 84308 or another standard?

Thank you for your attention to this inquiry. If explanation is required, please do not hesitate to contact the undersigned.

Very truly yours,

Stuart Scudder
City Attorney

By: GARY M. BAUM
Deputy City Attorney

0877U
